attack_chains.name: WebView RCE to Account Takeover
attack_chains.description: Attacker injects JavaScript via WebView, uses addJavascriptInterface to call native methods, then steals OAuth tokens.
steps: Invoke native Android methods via bridge interface
Extract OAuth token from app storage

attack_chains.name: SQL Injection to Database Dump
attack_chains.description: SQL injection via ContentProvider allows attacker to dump entire application database.
steps: Execute UNION SELECT to enumerate tables
Extract all sensitive data from database

attack_chains.name: IPC Bypass to Privilege Escalation
attack_chains.description: Malicious app exploits exported Activity/Service to trigger privileged operations without proper authorization.
steps: Discover exported components via manifest parsing
Launch exported Activity from malicious app
Gain unauthorized access to sensitive functionality

findings.title: SQL Injection via String Concatenation
findings.description: Raw SQL query constructed via string concatenation allows SQL injection by manipulating user input.
findings.evidence: db.rawQuery("SELECT * FROM users WHERE id='" + userId + "'")
findings.remediation: Use parameterized queries: db.rawQuery("SELECT * FROM users WHERE id=?", new String[]{userId})

findings.title: WebView JavaScript Enabled
findings.description: WebView has JavaScript enabled with addJavascriptInterface, creating a Remote Code Execution attack surface.
findings.remediation: Disable JavaScript unless required. Use @JavascriptInterface annotation with input validation.

findings.title: SQL Injection via String Concatenation
findings.description: Raw SQL query constructed via string concatenation allows SQL injection by manipulating user input.
findings.evidence: db.rawQuery("SELECT * FROM users WHERE id='" + userId + "'")
findings.remediation: Use parameterized queries: db.rawQuery("SELECT * FROM users WHERE id=?", new String[]{userId})

findings.title: WebView JavaScript Enabled
findings.description: WebView has JavaScript enabled with addJavascriptInterface, creating a Remote Code Execution attack surface.
findings.remediation: Disable JavaScript unless required. Use @JavascriptInterface annotation with input validation.

findings.title: Unvalidated Intent Extra Data
findings.description: Vulnerability detected matching OWASP M7 category: Unvalidated Intent Extra Data.
findings.evidence: Pattern matched in decompiled source. See full evidence in detailed report.
findings.remediation: Follow OWASP Mobile Top 10 guidelines and apply principle of least privilege.

findings.title: Exported Activity without Permission
findings.description: Activity is exported without permission restriction, allowing any app to launch it directly.
findings.remediation: Add android:permission attribute or set exported=false if not needed externally.

findings.title: Unvalidated Deep Link Handler
findings.description: Vulnerability detected matching OWASP M1 category: Unvalidated Deep Link Handler.
findings.evidence: Pattern matched in decompiled source. See full evidence in detailed report.
findings.remediation: Follow OWASP Mobile Top 10 guidelines and apply principle of least privilege.

findings.title: Debug Code in Production Build
findings.description: Vulnerability detected matching OWASP M10 category: Debug Code in Production Build.
findings.evidence: Pattern matched in decompiled source. See full evidence in detailed report.
findings.remediation: Follow OWASP Mobile Top 10 guidelines and apply principle of least privilege.

recommendations.action: Fix all CRITICAL severity vulnerabilities immediately before next release
Implement Certificate Pinning to prevent MITM attacks
Enable ProGuard/R8 obfuscation and disable debug flags
Replace all hardcoded credentials with secure key management
Conduct penetration test after fixes to verify remediation
